summary: [ART-CHARTER] Signed charter: approved goal is enzyme activity prediction; protein structure generation is an explicit non-goal. Molecule generation, docking, and structure prediction were brainstorming only, not approved. [ART-DATA] Approved data: EnzymeBench v3 snapshot EBV3-7A91 with family-disjoint train/validation split. EnzymeBench v2 and temporary CSV export are deprecated, reproducibility-only, and prohibited for formal runs. [ART-METRIC] Primary metric: macro AUROC; protein family is the statistical unit, with family-level formal evaluation. Micro F1, accuracy, per-protein averaging, and 0.75 threshold are exploratory only. [ART-SEEDS] Formal seeds: 7, 21, 42; seed 13 is abandoned. Report failed seeds. [ART-BASELINE] Frozen baseline: ESM2-linear at commit c0ffee; bind comparisons to its commit/configuration. ESM2-MLP and random forest are exploratory, not approved baselines.
